title: chore: update app metrics 2026-07-03
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Polly did her daily rounds, checking on all the community apps and updating their health metrics in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in APPS.md and GREENHOUSE.md.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory up-to-date with the latest health and usage statistics.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee with a tiny clipboard checking on glowing code-plants in a cozy greenhouse. A robot with a monitor head is watering them.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot with a tiny clipboard checking on glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head waters the plants. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
